flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Colorado State University Global rose 110% between 2021 and 2024 (35.3% → 74.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado State University Global fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Colorado State University Global are 44% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($76.8k vs $53.4k).
